snippet.title: iPhone 13 Pro vs iPhone 17 Pro: Watch This Before You BUY or UPGRADE
snippet.description:
Is the four-year jump from the iPhone 13 Pro to the brand-new iPhone 17 Pro the massive upgrade we've been waiting for? After using the 13 Pro for years and skipping several incremental updates, I'm going hands-on with the iPhone 17 Pro to see if now is finally the right time to make the switch.

This video is for anyone still holding onto an iPhone 13 Pro (or even an 11 or 12 Pro!) and wondering if the new features justify the price. We'll do a direct, side-by-side comparison to help you decide.

In This Video, We Cover:

Design & Display: Stainless Steel vs. the new Unibody Aluminum. We'll talk comfort, durability, and the "scratchgate" issue.   
Performance & Thermals: A15 Bionic vs. the monster A19 Pro chip. Is the new vapor chamber cooling a game-changer for performance?    
Battery Life: How does a fresh iPhone 17 Pro battery compare to my 13 Pro with 71% battery health?
The Camera System: This is the biggest leap. We compare the triple 12MP setup to the new triple 48MP system, testing the incredible 8x optical quality zoom and 4K 120fps video.   
Software: Does the lack of Apple Intelligence on the 13 Pro matter in 2025?    
Final Recommendations: Who should upgrade? Who should just replace their battery? And is a refurbished 13 Pro a better deal?

After watching, you'll know if the iPhone 17 Pro is a transformative upgrade or if the classic 13 Pro is still good enough to keep.

What are your thoughts? Let me know in the comments if you're upgrading this year!

Thanks for watching! Don't forget to like and subscribe for more tech reviews.

#iphone13pro #iphone17pro

snippet.title: Fujinon Premista 28–100mm x iPhone 17 Pro Max x Beastgrip DOF Adapter Фoton
snippet.description:
Quick video showcasing the Fujinon Premista 28–100mm paired with the iPhone 17 Pro Max via the Beastgrip DOF Adapter Фoton.

The Фoton is a proof-of-concept DOF adapter built in limited quantities, not just for testing, but as a fully functional system used by select creative teams in real productions around the globe.

The first project filmed with the Фoton was “O₂” by Stanislav Kapralov, demonstrating its cinematic potential and creative flexibility.
https://beastgrip.com/pages/o2-short-film-shot-on-iphone-with-beastgrip-dof-adapter-oton-foton-photon

Since then, the adapter has been used in commercials, music videos, films, and live broadcasts for MSL and MLB, including Amazon Thursday Night Football halftime highlights, all #ShotOniPhone.

We’re continuing to gather feedback from professionals and refine the design as we move toward the next-generation release.
The upcoming version will be available in both Sony E-mount and PL-mount options.

Right now, the Фoton adapter is available for rent through select partners:
Old Fast Glass (LA) - https://www.oldfastglass.com
CINEMA VISION (NY) - https://motionpicturerentals.com
Revolt Camera Inc (CA) - https://revoltcamera.com
Rvz rentals (FR) - https://rvz-location.fr

We’re excited to share more information about the Фoton soon, so stay tuned. This adapter represents our ongoing commitment to pushing the boundaries of smartphone filmmaking, bringing professional cinema tools and optical performance into the mobile space.

Shot on iPhone with Beastcam App

snippet.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max vs Galaxy S25 Ultra vs Huawei Pura 80 Ultra vs Pixel 10 Pro XL: Comparativa cámara
snippet.description:
📸 Comparativa de cámaras: iPhone 17 Pro Max vs Pixel 10 Pro XL vs Honor Magic 7 Pro vs Huawei Pura 80 Ultra vs OPPO Find X8 Ultra vs Galaxy S25 Ultra

En este video enfrentamos seis de los móviles más potentes del 2025 en el área de fotografía y vídeo. Analizamos cómo rinden sus sistemas de cámara: zoom, ultra-gran angular, sensores grandes, estabilización, y lo que se nota al usarlos en la vida real.

El iPhone 17 Pro Max presenta tres cámaras principales de 48 MP Fusion, incluido un nuevo teleobjetivo con zoom óptico 8×. 

El Pixel 10 Pro XL ofrece triple cámara trasera (50 MP principal, 48 MP ultra-wide, 48 MP 5× telefoto) y zoom digital hasta 100×. 

El Honor Magic 7 Pro sorprende con cámara principal de 50 MP (f/1.4-f/2.0), ultra-gran angular de 50 MP y telefoto de 200 MP con zoom 3×. 

El Huawei Pura 80 Ultra integra sensor principal de 50 MP tipo 1-pulgada, teleobjetivo espectacular y promete “16 paradas de rango dinámico”. 
Huawei Consumer

El OPPO Find X8 Ultra monta cuatro lentes de 50 MP, incluyendo dos teleobjetivos (3× y 6×), sensor de 1″ y vídeo 4K/120 fps. 

El Galaxy S25 Ultra llega con sensor principal de 200 MP, ultra-wide de 50 MP, telefoto de 50 MP periscópico 5×, y un conjunto que apunta al dominio en foto-móvil. 

👉 ¿Cuál se mueve mejor en luz baja? ¿Cuál ofrece zoom más realista? ¿Y cuál da el mejor balance entre hardware y experiencia real de foto/vídeo? Eso te lo cuento en detalle con ejemplos prácticos.

snippet.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max Gaming Performance Test in 5 AAA Games Tested
snippet.description:

GTA San Andreas Definitive Edition, Genshin Impact, Assassin’s Creed Mirage, Resident Evil Village, and PUBG Mobile.
We’ll see how the all-new A19 Pro chip, vapor chamber cooling, and upgraded GPU handle these demanding titles in real-world gameplay scenarios.
This is a complete performance, FPS, and thermal test with the Metal HUD overlay for live monitoring.

snippet.title: Redémarrage iPhone 17 Pro : méthode classique + astuce Siri 💡
snippet.description:
iPhone bloqué ? Voici 4 méthodes pour le redémarrer facilement 🔋📱

Salut à tous, c’est Répare Facile 👋
Aujourd’hui, je vais vous montrer comment redémarrer un iPhone 17, 17 Pro, ou tout autre iPhone récent sous iOS 26.

💡 Il existe plusieurs façons de redémarrer votre iPhone :

1️⃣ Méthode avec les boutons :
Appuyez sur Volume + et le bouton latéral, puis faites glisser pour éteindre.
Appuyez ensuite sur le bouton latéral pour rallumer.

2️⃣ Depuis l’écran :
Appuyez sur l’icône d’alimentation en haut de l’écran et faites glisser pour éteindre.
Rallumez avec le bouton latéral.

3️⃣ Depuis les réglages :
Allez dans Réglages → Général → Éteindre, puis faites glisser pour éteindre.

4️⃣ Avec Siri (méthode la plus simple) :
Assurez-vous que Siri est activé via Réglages → Siri et Apple Intelligent.
Dites ensuite : “Hey Siri, redémarre mon iPhone”.
Confirmez, et votre iPhone redémarre automatiquement sans appuyer sur aucun bouton.

📱 Cette méthode est pratique si vos boutons sont endommagés ou que vous préférez une solution 100 % vocale.

📌 N’oubliez pas :
👍 Liker la vidéo
🔔 Vous abonner à la chaîne
💬 Laisser un commentaire si vous avez besoin d’aide
